COVID all over again…

Jan. 22, 2020
“We have it totally under control.”

Jan. 30, 2020
“We think we have it very well under control.”

Feb. 2, 2020
“We pretty much shut it down coming in from China.”

Feb. 10, 2020
“It’s going to be fine.”

Feb. 24, 2020
“The Coronavirus is very much under control in the USA.”

Feb. 25, 2020
“I think that’s a problem that’s going to go away.”

Feb. 26, 2020
“When you have 15 people… the 15 within a couple of days is going to be down to close to zero.”

Feb. 27,
Nothing says “everything is under control” like someone constantly yelling at everyone not to panic

It’s like he wants to lose


OSINTdefender (@sentdefender)

During his interview Saturday with NBC News about the Iran War, President Trump suddenly attacked Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky, who has sent counter drone systems and experts to the Middle East to assist combating the threat of Iranian one-way attack drones, saying “I’m surprised that Zelensky doesn’t want to make a deal. Tell Zelensky to make a deal because Putin’s willing to make a deal.” Trump added that Zelensky was “far m

These lies do nothing but placate his ever-shrinking MAGA base.

Iran knows the truth. The rest of the world knows the truth.

This posturing only makes Trump look weak.

This isn’t WWE. This is real life. Act like it.


OSINTdefender (@sentdefender)

As reported on Meidas News on Thursday: meidasnews.com/news/trump-o...
Nothing says “everything is under control” like someone constantly yelling at everyone not to panic
Why does Trump need allies to help him in a war he’s already won?

This moment from Feb 2025 may go down as one of the most prescient exchanges in modern diplomatic history. Zelenskyy warned Trump that while the United States may feel protected by an ocean today, a time could come when America would need help in war. Trump scolded him instead.

He is begging like a dog, one might say.

This war and Trump’s alienation of our allies may go down as among the greatest foreign policy failures of any presidency in history.
Join us. Let’s keep growing:

The truth is this war has been a failure of historic proportions. They don’t want Americans to know that. But we will never stop covering it honestly and with the critical lens that something this serious deserves.

Brendan Carr is threatening the media to cover the war the way the Trump regime wants. It’s one of the most anti-American messages ever posted by a government official.

1/

Ben and Popok take the controls of the top-rated Legal AF Podcast, breaking down news from Iran to the courts and Congress, plus the Fed and Supreme Court. They cover scandals rocking the administration and new pay-to-play allegations tied to Trump and his family. Tune in LIVE at 8 pm ET!

Trump practically told our allies to f-off — that we didn’t need them, that the U.S. had already “won.”

Now he’s begging them for help.

Trump says the U.S. will be “bombing the hell out of the shoreline” and shooting Iranian boats out of the water to keep the Strait of Hormuz open, while claiming Iran’s military has been “100% destroyed” (not true). He also called on China, France, Japan, South Korea, and the U.K. to send warships.

that decision could change if Iran interferes with shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran exports 90% of its crude via Kharg Island, for shipping through the narrow Strait of Hormuz. Trump’s claims have not been independently verified at this time. 2/2

BREAKING: Donald Trump claims the U.S. carried out a major bombing raid on Iran’s Kharg Island, saying U.S. forces “totally obliterated” military targets there. He says the U.S. chose not to destroy the island’s oil infrastructure but warned… 1/

🚨NEWS: Democrat Andy Thomson has won the Boca Raton mayoral race by just ONE vote.

🔵 Thomson — 7,568
🔴 Liebelson — 7,567

With 100% of votes in, Thomson becomes the first Democratic mayor of Boca Raton in over 30 years.

One vote decided the election.
Iran’s Foreign Minister on Trump temporarily loosening sanctions against Russia

BREAKING: A federal judge just blocked DOJ subpoenas targeting Fed Chair Jerome Powell, ruling there is “a mountain of evidence” they were used to pressure Powell to lower interest rates or resign. Trump’s social media posts are featured prominently in the opinion.
The propaganda and lies from the White House do nothing to make Americans safer and only serve the interests of the Iranian regime.

NEWS: U.S. economic growth revised down sharply in Q4 2025.

GDP expanded at just 0.7%, down from the previously reported 1.4%.

BREAKING: All 6 crew members aboard the U.S. KC-135 died in the incident. 

CENTCOM continues to say the loss of the aircraft was not due to “hostile fire or friendly fire” but has not provided additional details.

May they rest in peace.
Hegseth on more American soldiers dying yesterday in the Iran War: “Bad things can happen”
